title: Change font size in dropdown lists
excerpt:
Documentation doesn’t seem to have a way to render the input components like Material UI 

Is there any way to change the font size for Dropdown inputs using apps framework ?

posts.author: wk_kong (Woon Kit Kong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Documentation doesn’t seem to have a way to render the input components like Material UI

Is there any way to change the font size for Dropdown inputs using apps framework ?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @wk_kong,

If the question is if you can change the font size of the values of a dropdown column inside a monday board via a script, that can not be done.

If I misunderstood the question let me know!

Cheers,
Matias
